name: Owler Competitive Intelligence API
what_it_does: Crowdsourced competitive intelligence platform with REST API — providing company profiles, revenue estimates, employee counts, technology stack data, news alerts, funding announcements, leadership changes, and competitive relationship mapping based on community contributions and data partnerships.
use_cases: Querying company profiles and revenue estimates for sales prospecting enrichment
Monitoring competitor news alerts and funding events for sales intelligence
Pulling competitive relationship maps to identify indirect competitors
Integrating company firmographic data with CRM for account enrichment
Automating competitive news digest delivery to sales team Slack channels
not_for: Deep competitive battlecard and positioning analysis (use Crayon or Klue)
Contact-level prospecting data (use ZoomInfo or Apollo.io)
Real-time web and social media monitoring (use Crayon for live monitoring)
best_when: A sales or marketing team wants quick access to company profiles, revenue estimates, and competitor news alerts for prospecting and competitive awareness, especially for SMB and mid-market companies not covered deeply by premium data providers.
avoid_when: You need verified contact data, deep competitive battlecard intelligence, real-time social monitoring, or enterprise-grade data accuracy guarantees.

auth.notes: API key from Owler account. Passed as x-api-key header. Account-scoped access. No webhooks for real-time events. News feed polling required for updates. Rate limits apply per plan.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free community tier with limited company lookups
pricing.paid_tiers: Pro $35/month; Max $50/month; Enterprise API pricing custom
pricing.notes: San Francisco-based company. Founded 2012. Acquired by Meltwater (2021). Now part of Meltwater's media intelligence suite. Crowdsourced revenue estimates — largest crowd-verified database of private company revenue estimates. 15M+ company profiles. News signal aggregation. Competitive mapping unique feature. Popular with SMB-focused sales teams.

performance.rate_limits: 100 requests/minute on Pro; higher on Enterprise

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for company profiles, competitors, news, and financials. x-api-key header. Moderate documentation. Meltwater acquisition may affect API roadmap. Revenue estimates are crowdsourced — verify accuracy for high-stakes decisions. No webhooks — must poll for news updates.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: All reads are fully idempotent. Company profile reads idempotent. News reads idempotent by date range. Competitor reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Revenue estimates are crowdsourced — accuracy varies, especially for private companies
Meltwater acquisition (2021) may affect API development priorities
No webhooks — must implement polling for real-time news alerts
API access requires Enterprise plan — community/Pro plans have limited API
Competitive relationship data is community-maintained — may have gaps

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. US data residency. x-api-key header auth. Company financial estimates are sensitive competitive data — restrict access. Meltwater acquisition brings enterprise security posture. Crowdsourced data quality varies — validate before using in automated workflows.
